headlines.title: Four swing House races in Pennsylvania loom large for both parties — and for 2028, too
headlines.description: Control of the House of Representatives could come down to four pivotal battleground races in Pennsylvania

headlines.title: San Diego mosque suspects’ writings reveal influence of online extremism, experts say
headlines.description: The two teenage suspects in this week’s deadly attack on a San Diego mosque appear to have written a 75-page document replete with neo-Nazi ideology, incel rage and racist meme culture drawn from the darkest corners of the internet

headlines.title: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche says Castro indictment is 'big step forward'
headlines.description: Acting U.S. Attorney General Todd Blanche discusses the indictment of former Cuban President Raúl Castro, charged with the 1996 downing of two civilian planes. He called the move a "big step forward" for Cuban Americans.

headlines.title: SpaceX plans for a record-breaking IPO
headlines.description: SpaceX confirmed plans to sell shares of its stock to the public for the first time. NBC News' David Ingram has more on the developments.

headlines.title: Health Officials Race to Trace Rising Ebola Cases in Central Africa
headlines.description: The American doctor who tested positive for Ebola while working in Congo has been evacuated to Berlin to receive emergency care. Health officials are racing to trace infections in Central Africa and worry the scale of the outbreak is already larger than first reported. NBC’s Molly Hunter reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Sen. Dick Durbin warns DOJ against ‘doling out compensation to rioters’ in new Trump fund
headlines.description: Durbin, the top Democrat on the Judiciary Committee, asked acting Attorney General Todd Blanche to provide more details about Trump’s $1.8B “anti-weaponization” fund.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Detroit-bound flight diverted to Canada after passenger from Congo boarded ‘in error’ amid Ebola outbreak
headlines.description: An Air France flight bound for Detroit was redirected to Canada after a passenger from Congo boarded “in error” amid the Ebola outbreak in central Africa, officials said.

headlines.title: Colorado Democrats censure Gov. Jared Polis for commuting election denier’s sentence
headlines.description: Colorado Democrats voted to censure Gov. Jared Polis for commuting the prison sentence of Tina Peters, an election denier who had been serving nine years in state prison for tampering with voting systems.

headlines.title: Former prosecutor emailed herself the unreleased Jack Smith report, DOJ alleges
headlines.description: A former federal prosecutor was indicted on charges she emailed herself confidential files from special counsel Jack Smith’s investigation of allegations that President Donald Trump mishandled classified documents, the Justice Department said.

headlines.title: Teacher’s assistant at San Diego mosque recalls students’ bravery as gunmen banged on doors
headlines.description: Like schools across the U.S., the Islamic Center of San Diego had sought to prepare its students for the possibility that a gunman could breach its walls.

headlines.title: Vanessa Trump reveals breast cancer diagnosis
headlines.description: Vanessa Trump, the ex-wife of Donald Trump Jr., has been diagnosed with breast cancer, she said.
